subcodes.first_line: O steadfast believer! Thy letter, laden with sighs and lamentations, hath indeed evoked deep sorrow and regret. Truly, the endurance of hardship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن ممتحن نامه پر آه و ناله سبب تاثر و تحسر گردید فی الحقیقه تحمل عسر
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
